item.title: Finding Jade in the Outdoors
item.description: A prospector’s search for jade shows how challenging gemstone hunting can be in the field.

item.title: 1969 and 2017 Camaro Build Request
item.description: A customer asks for both a 1969 Camaro and a 2017 Camaro SS, highlighting classic and modern design preferences.

item.title: A Car Repo Story with High Stakes
item.description: A tense repo moment unfolds as one person tries to keep their car. Choppertown shares the scene with a focus on the drama and reaction.
